category_sources: source_facts.description: Expose HTTP applications to a Tailscale Tailnet network.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the best documentation surface found from source_facts.homepage/repo.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/shayne/tsnet-serve; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify a CLI for exposing HTTP apps to a Tailscale tailnet.
